title: Longhorn Volume
description: Schema for Longhorn distributed block storage volumes. Longhorn volumes provide persistent block storage for Kubernetes workloads with automatic replication, snapshots, and backup to external storage targets.

name.description: Unique name for the volume within the Longhorn namespace.

size.description: Size of the volume in bytes as a string, e.g. '10737418240' for 10 GiB.

numberOfReplicas.description: Number of data replicas maintained across Longhorn nodes. Higher values increase durability but consume more storage.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the volume.

robustness.description: Health status of the volume based on replica availability and data integrity.

frontend.description: Frontend protocol used to expose the volume to workloads. blockdev is the most common.

accessMode.description: Volume access mode. rwo is ReadWriteOnce for a single pod; rwx is ReadWriteMany for multiple pods.

dataLocality.description: Data locality policy. disabled places replicas freely; best-effort prefers the attached node; strict-local forces one replica on the attached node.

replicaAutoBalance.description: Automatic rebalancing policy for distributing replicas evenly across nodes.

encrypted.description: Whether the volume data is encrypted at rest using the configured encryption secret.

migratable.description: Whether the volume supports live migration between nodes.

backingImage.description: Name of a backing image to use as pre-populated base data for this volume.

currentImage.description: Longhorn engine image currently in use by this volume.

nodeSelector.description: Node tags to restrict which nodes can host replicas of this volume.

diskSelector.description: Disk tags to restrict which disks can host replicas of this volume.

recurringJobSelector.description: Recurring jobs and groups assigned to this volume for automated operations.

replicas.description: List of replica instances maintaining copies of this volume's data.

conditions.description: Map of named health conditions for the volume.

kubernetesStatus.description: Kubernetes PVC and PV binding status for this volume.

Replica.description: A Longhorn replica storing a copy of volume data on a specific node and disk.

name.description: Unique name of the replica instance.

hostId.description: Kubernetes node name where this replica is located.

diskID.description: Disk identifier on the node where this replica's data is stored.

dataPath.description: Full file system path to the replica data directory on the node.

mode.description: Replica mode. RW means fully operational; WO means write-only during rebuilding; ERR means the replica has failed.

running.description: Whether the replica process is currently running.

failedAt.description: Timestamp when the replica last failed, if applicable.

Snapshot.description: A point-in-time snapshot of a Longhorn volume.

name.description: Unique name of the snapshot within the volume.

created.description: Timestamp when the snapshot was created.

size.description: Storage consumed by this snapshot in bytes as a string.

parent.description: Name of the parent snapshot in the chain.

removed.description: Whether this snapshot has been marked for removal.

usercreated.description: Whether this snapshot was created manually. False indicates a system-created snapshot.

RecurringJobRef.description: Reference to a recurring job or group assigned to a volume.

name.description: Name of the recurring job or group.

isGroup.description: Whether this reference is to a group rather than an individual job.

RecurringJob.description: A Longhorn recurring job for scheduling automated snapshot or backup operations.

name.description: Unique name of the recurring job.

task.description: Type of operation this recurring job performs.

cron.description: Cron expression defining the schedule, e.g. '0 2 * * *' for 2:00 AM daily.

retain.description: Number of snapshots or backups to retain. Older items are automatically deleted.

concurrency.description: Maximum number of volumes to process simultaneously when this job fires.

labels.description: Labels to apply to snapshots or backups created by this job.

groups.description: Group names this job belongs to. Volumes assigned to the group will be processed.

Node.description: A Longhorn storage node participating in the cluster.

name.description: Node identifier, matching the Kubernetes node name.

allowScheduling.description: Whether new replicas can be scheduled on this node.

evictionRequested.description: Whether replica eviction has been requested for this node.

tags.description: Tags applied to this node for workload placement affinity.

disks.description: Map of disk configurations on this node keyed by disk name.

DiskSpec.description: Configuration for a disk available for Longhorn replica storage.

path.description: File system path to the disk or directory used for Longhorn storage.

allowScheduling.description: Whether new replicas can be scheduled on this disk.

evictionRequested.description: Whether eviction of replicas from this disk has been requested.

storageReserved.description: Storage in bytes reserved for non-Longhorn use on this disk.

tags.description: Tags for disk affinity in volume and replica placement.

Condition.description: A health condition for a Longhorn resource.

lastProbeTime.description: Timestamp of the last condition probe.

lastTransitionTime.description: Timestamp of the last condition transition.

KubernetesStatus.description: Kubernetes PVC and PV binding status for a Longhorn volume.

pvName.description: Name of the Kubernetes PersistentVolume bound to this Longhorn volume.

pvcName.description: Name of the Kubernetes PersistentVolumeClaim using this volume.

lastPVCRefAt.description: Timestamp when the PVC was last bound.
